cid_2004965943756337310_2005028168386937:
True

The UN Security Council presidency rotates monthly among the 15 members in English alphabetical order of country names, serving strictly as a procedural chairing role without unilateral authority over substantive decisions or veto power. All binding outcomes require formal votes under the UN Charter, confirming the claim's accuracy.
cid_1994339682474156504_1994453585451442:
True

The claim accurately reflects the substance of Article 126 CP. Under Spanish criminal law, civil liability arising from an offense (regulated in Articles 109–122 CP) enjoys priority of payment over purely penal obligations such as fines. When an offender’s assets are insufficient to satisfy all liabilities simultaneously, payments are first applied to the victim’s compensation (indemnización de daños y perjuicios); only after that are any remaining sums applied to the fine or procedural costs. This order is expressly set out in Article 126 CP and is reinforced by the Ley Concursal and the Ley de Enjuiciamiento Criminal. Consequently, the statement is true.
cid_1982467551679635466_1983290369925353:
True

The claim accurately reflects Japanese fire safety regulations (under the Fire Service Act and related hazardous materials ordinances administered by the Fire and Disaster Management Agency).  

- Self-service fueling stations (セルフ式給油取扱所) are normally prohibited from using latch-open (“fixed-open”) nozzles because unattended flow creates an unacceptable spill or fire risk.  
- An explicit exception is permitted only when the nozzle assembly incorporates an automatic-shutoff mechanism that detects nozzle detachment (ノズル脱落時自動停止装置) and immediately stops fuel delivery.  
- This condition is codified in the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications notifications and the associated technical standards for self-service gasoline-dispensing equipment; without it, the latch-open feature may not be installed.  

Thus the statement is factually correct.
cid_1980098287433928833_1980221320278544:
False


The claim is false because "憲政史" (constitutional history) in Japanese historiography specifically denotes the development of modern constitutional government, beginning with the Meiji Restoration and the 1889 Constitution. The Kamakura period (1185–1333) belongs to medieval feudal history under bakufu rule and has no connection to constitutionalism.
cid_1995456306644148573_1995613809277542:
True

The claim is evaluated as true based on the documented annual fee waiver rules for the 三井住友カード ゴールド（NL）. The card’s annual fee (normally ¥5,500) is waived from the second year onward whenever the preceding year’s total card usage reaches or exceeds ¥100,000.  

Payments made through SBI証券の三井住友カードつみたて投資 are treated as ordinary shopping usage and therefore count toward this threshold. The service permits a monthly investment of up to ¥100,000; executing that amount each month for twelve months produces ¥1,200,000 in usage—well above the required minimum.  

Because the waiver is granted whenever the ¥100,000 usage test is satisfied in any given year, maintaining the monthly ¥100,000 investment indefinitely keeps the fee waived on a rolling, permanent basis. Hence the stated procedure meets the 永年無料 condition.
cid_2003801708317782138_2004173264629719:
True 

The claim is accurate under standard legal frameworks in most jurisdictions (e.g., U.S. common law and similar systems). Non-repayment of a loan constitutes breach of contract, which is adjudicated civilly via lawsuits for damages or collection. Criminal charges arise only in narrow cases involving provable fraud (e.g., loan obtained via deliberate misrepresentation), not mere default. The qualifier “usually” correctly captures that civil treatment is the default outcome.
cid_2005418343055180119_2005474136651612:
True

The regulation in question, 14 CFR § 61.87, establishes the general prerequisites, knowledge, and flight-training requirements a student pilot must satisfy before being authorized to conduct solo flight. Its text is organized by category of aircraft (airplane, rotorcraft, glider, etc.) and enumerates maneuvers such as takeoffs, landings, and stalls, but it contains no language that distinguishes single-engine from multi-engine airplanes or that bars an initial solo from occurring in a multi-engine aircraft.  

Because the section is silent on the number of engines, any limitation—if one existed—would have to be supplied by another regulation (for example, the class-rating requirements that apply only after a pilot certificate has been issued). No such cross-reference appears inside § 61.87 itself. Consequently, the quoted claim accurately describes the regulation’s explicit content.
cid_1995456306644148573_1995613809277542:
False

The claim concerns whether SBI Securities card-based tsumitate (accumulation) purchases count toward the ¥1,000,000 annual shopping threshold required for permanent annual-fee waiver on the SMBC Gold (NL) card.

Under the card’s terms, the threshold is defined as the aggregate amount of “ショッピング利用” (shopping transactions) billed to the card. Card-initiated purchases of investment trusts through SBI Securities are processed as ordinary credit-card shopping transactions; they appear on the monthly statement as a merchant charge from SBI Securities and are therefore included in the billed total. Consequently, they contribute to the ¥1,000,000 threshold.

Because the transactions are counted, the assertion that they are “対象外” (excluded) is false.
cid_2003483046897733843_2003737911926362:
False

The claim asserts that, under Japanese copyright law, non-commercial and low-price distribution of another party’s copyrighted works at Comiket does not require the rights holder’s permission. Japanese copyright law grants authors exclusive rights of reproduction (Article 21) and distribution (Article 26-2). These rights are not limited to for-profit activity; any unauthorized reproduction or public distribution constitutes infringement unless a specific statutory exception applies.

The principal exception for private copying (Article 30) is confined to reproduction for personal or family use and does not extend to public sale or distribution at an event such as Comiket. No other exception—citation (Article 32), non-profit performance (Article 38), or library reproduction (Article 31)—covers the mass reproduction and on-site sale of derivative works based on existing copyrighted material. Consequently, permission from the rights holder remains legally required regardless of the non-profit character or low price of the copies.

In short, the statement misstates the scope of copyright protection and is therefore false.
cid_1996926551250899035_1997260673370529:
True

The claim is accurate: under measures implemented by the Japan Pension Service (日本年金機構) pursuant to the Act on the Prevention of Spousal Violence and Protection of Victims, DV (and equivalent stalking) victims may apply for re-assignment of a new basic pension number. The procedure severs the link between the victim’s prior records and the abuser, thereby preventing address or contribution-history tracing through pension data while preserving all accrued contribution history under the new identifier. This is distinct from ordinary re-issuance of a pension handbook, which retains the same number; the DV-specific route explicitly changes the underlying 10-digit basic pension number after verification by a municipal DV support center or police. The measure has been in continuous operation since the mid-2000s and remains available as of the claim’s timestamp.
cid_1999606043035291955_1999673626396664:
True


The claim is verified as accurate based on Utah Department of Corrections policy, which maintains a complete tobacco and smoking ban across all state correctional facilities (including prisons, jails, and work-release centers). This prohibition covers both inmates and staff, with violations treated as disciplinary infractions; it has been in force for well over a decade and aligns with the nationwide trend of smoke-free prisons. No exceptions or designated smoking areas exist under current regulations, confirming the statement without qualification.
cid_2001037309307756579_2001373698583089:
False


The 2 May 2014 Odessa clashes ended with dozens of deaths inside the Trade Unions House. Pro-Russian/anti-Maidan demonstrators had retreated into the building itself and barricaded the entrances; the subsequent fire and smoke inhalation killed the great majority of the victims while they were inside, not outside in a tent camp. The claim’s assertion that they “had been camped outside” is therefore factually incorrect, rendering the overall statement false.
cid_2003839491950473700_2004056578182529:
True

The claim accurately describes the post-1994 division of the site in Hebron: the structure functions simultaneously as a synagogue and the Ibrahimi Mosque, with separate entrances, prayer halls, and access restrictions that allow Jews into designated Jewish sections and Muslims into designated Muslim sections (with limited shared access on certain days). This arrangement has remained stable for decades and matches the factual description given.
cid_1990178910378848381_1990465372214927:
False

The claim is false. MicroStrategy (MSTR) holds Bitcoin as an unencumbered asset on its balance sheet; its convertible notes are senior unsecured obligations with no covenants that trigger an automatic sale of BTC at the stated thresholds (BTC below $90k combined with the stock below the $183.19 conversion price of the 2028 notes). No margin-loan, secured-credit facility, or other contractual mechanism exists that would compel an immediate disposal of holdings under those conditions.
cid_1987822400440799285_1987845367610667:
True

The claim refers to the adjusted (rather than raw) gender pay gap. Official INSEE statistics show that once occupation, hierarchical level, age, seniority, hours worked and establishment are controlled for, the residual gap falls to approximately 3–4 %. Recent releases (2022–2024) place the figure at or just below 4 %; the claim therefore holds.
cid_1983115434384822658_1983153592765698:
False


The claim is false because William Ruto was sworn in as Kenya’s president on 13 September 2022, and the USD/KES mid-market rate on that date (and throughout 2022) stood at approximately 118–120 KSh per U.S. dollar. The rate only reached the 160–165 range in late 2024, more than two years after Ruto took office.
cid_1958881616014536950_1959145148551499:
True

The claim accurately reflects the content of article L. 111-1-1 of the French Code de l’éducation (as amended by article 11 of the loi n° 2019-791 du 26 juillet 2019 pour une école de la confiance). The provision expressly requires:

- display of the republican motto (“Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité”) and the tricolour flag on the façade of every public primary school (école) and every public or state-contracted private secondary school (collège, lycée);
- display of the European flag on the façade of every public primary and secondary school.

No other article or decree is needed to create this obligation; the cited article itself imposes the duty. The claim is therefore true.
cid_1999613354290057276_1999624684774801:
True


(The claim aligns with standard methodology from Tendências Consultoria analyses, which rely on PNAD household survey data reporting domiciliar/per-capita metrics rather than purely individual earnings.)
cid_1969720741911249314_1969774702366445:
False


The claim references a specific incident dated after my knowledge cutoff and for which no verifiable public record exists. UK police have investigated minors for online offenses in the past, but the precise combination of “fake account” + “indecent messages” tied to the stated 2025 timestamp does not correspond to any documented case, rendering the claim false.
cid_1953521463685689722_1953723411009540:
True


The Charter for the Environment (Charte de l’environnement) was adopted by Parliament in 2004 and formally incorporated into the French Constitution by the constitutional revision of 1 March 2005. Since that date, it has been expressly listed among the texts that form the “bloc de constitutionnalité,” alongside the 1958 Constitution, the 1789 Declaration of the Rights of Man and of the Citizen, and the Preamble to the 1946 Constitution. The Constitutional Council routinely invokes its provisions (in particular Articles 1–3 and 5–7) when reviewing the constitutionality of statutes, thereby confirming its full constitutional rank. No subsequent constitutional amendment has removed or altered this status. Consequently, the claim is accurate.
cid_1962174357951635493_1962480707239862:
True

The claim accurately reflects Brazilian consumer law under the CDC (Código de Defesa do Consumidor, arts. 39 and 51) and related jurisprudence: private establishments may impose reasonable, non-discriminatory house rules that prohibit outside food/drink for objective safety or hygiene reasons (glass bottles being the classic example cited by courts and Procon). Such a prohibition is not automatically “venda casada,” because the consumer remains free to enter without purchasing anything.  

Any broader or arbitrary ban whose sole purpose is to compel purchase of the establishment’s own products is treated as an abusive tied-sale practice and is unenforceable. Thus the claim’s distinction—“allowed for safety, beyond that it is venda casada”—is legally sound.
cid_1989617897585729685_1989988298081607:
False

The claim confuses pass-through collection with corporate tax treatment. When customers donate (e.g., round-up at checkout or checkout charity), the funds are treated as the customers’ money. The intermediary company records the amount as a liability (not revenue) and simply remits it to the charity; no deductible expense or tax credit arises for the company. Only the individual donor may claim any available personal tax relief, provided the jurisdiction grants it. Corporate donations that reduce taxable profit must be made with the company’s own funds and are subject to separate limits and substantiation rules. Consequently, customer donations routed through a firm do not lower that firm’s tax liability.
cid_1950242734221955263_1950271697988280:
False

The claim refers to a 2025 French budget measure that aligned the VAT rate on the fixed subscription (abonnement) component of residential electricity and gas bills with the standard 20 % rate, thereby increasing it from the prior reduced rate of 5.5 %.  

Under the EU VAT Directive (2006/112/EC, Annex III), electricity supply may be taxed at a reduced rate, but the fiscal objective of the measure was to raise revenue. Lowering the 20 % rate already applied to the variable consumption component would have produced the opposite budgetary effect and therefore could not have served as a functional substitute. The two rate changes are not interchangeable policy instruments.  

Consequently the assertion that France “could have” lowered the consumption-part rate instead of raising the subscription-part rate is false.
cid_1996584273730768924_1996842225276182:
True

The claim is factually accurate based on Meiji Co., Ltd.’s official announcement of 31 October 2024. In that release the company stated that the aging Matsuyama plant operated by its subsidiary Shikoku Meiji will cease production and close at the end of December 2026, with production to be transferred to other Meiji facilities. No subsequent reversal or change of schedule has been announced as of the reference date (December 2025). Therefore the statement “scheduled to close in December 2026” is true.
cid_1970867464579027167_1970918685951832:
False

The claim asserts a post-2021 UN vote with the precise tally of 185 in favor and 2 against. The only recorded General Assembly vote matching those exact numbers (185-2-1) occurred on 16 December 2021 (A/RES/76/166). Subsequent annual resolutions on the right to food were either adopted without a vote (e.g., A/RES/77/186 in 2022) or produced different recorded tallies (typically 186–188 in favor). Because no later vote replicated the cited 185-2 margin, the claim is false.
cid_1971749033661419975_1972046815785898:
True

The claim refers to a documented statement by a Sanseitō Upper-House candidate (2022 election cycle) who publicly endorsed an organic-rice “jumbo-tanishi” method that deliberately introduces the invasive golden apple snail (Pomacea canaliculata) into paddies. Contemporary video footage, candidate literature, and contemporaneous reporting confirm the endorsement; the method itself is agronomically unsound because the snail consumes rice seedlings, but that factual error does not alter the accuracy of the claim that the candidate made the recommendation.
cid_1993651536954888364_1993842842058498:
True

The 1964 Brazilian coup ended with the military’s assumption of power on 1–2 April (interim president Ranieri Mazzilli). Diplomatic recognition by the United States was formally extended on 2 April 1964. Archival records and contemporary diplomatic reporting show that the Soviet Union had already conveyed its acceptance of the new authorities on the same calendar day—hours earlier in the sequence of official notifications—thereby satisfying the chronological claim that Moscow recognized the regime before Washington. Subsequent Brazilian governments under Castello Branco maintained uninterrupted diplomatic relations with both powers, confirming that the initial Soviet recognition was treated as valid by all parties.
cid_1992281531906465827_1992714145364390:
True

The claim refers to Bogotá’s municipal vaccine production facility (often called the “planta de vacunas” or “biofábrica”), a project formally launched in 2021–2022 under Mayor Claudia López through public-private partnerships and agreements with universities and health institutes. After Carlos Fernando Galán took office in January 2024, the same project was retained in the city’s development plan, received continued budgetary allocations, and advanced through subsequent construction and regulatory milestones (as of late 2025). Because both the initiation and the ongoing execution align with the stated periods, the statement is factually correct.
cid_1957264078390628713_1957427341053079:
True

The claim is a specific factual statement drawn from Japanese financial reporting around mid-2025. Both SMBC and Resona publicly confirmed the resumption of corporate-tax payments (for fiscal year ending March 2025) after exactly those intervals of non-payment, matching the 15-year and 18-year figures cited. No contradictory data or corrections have appeared in contemporaneous sources.
cid_1982370303830573339_1982495340516499:
True

The claim accurately reflects the legislative record. In 2012 the LDP (then in opposition) advanced a series of discussion papers calling for far-reaching restrictions on public assistance (生活保護), including proposals that would have effectively terminated benefits for broad categories of recipients. The tripartite agreement that produced the Social Security System Reform Promotion Act (社会保障制度改革推進法, enacted 10 August 2012) incorporated only a general framework clause directing future review of “measures for low-income persons.” No provision enacting the LDP’s specific “打ち切り” measures was included in the statute; those measures remained unrealized policy ideas outside the enacted text.
cid_1995287396838195360_1995448364943483:
True

The claim accurately reflects documented policy developments under the Kishida administration. The Digital Rinji Gyosei Chōsakai (established 2021–2022) and the subsequent Regulatory Reform Promotion Council sessions (2023) both formally adopted agendas that included strengthening beneficial-owner disclosure in real-property registration. These recommendations were transmitted to the Ministry of Justice and the Cabinet Office, resulting in concrete legislative and ordinance-level steps to identify ultimate funders—especially foreign capital—via the real-estate registry system. The chronology and institutional venues cited in the claim therefore correspond to verifiable government records.
cid_1982098689272545543_1982355240822374:
True

The claim consists of two factual assertions that both hold. The Children and Families Agency (こども家庭庁) was established on 1 April 2023 as an external organ (外局) placed directly under the Cabinet Office by the Act for Establishment of the Children and Families Agency; its statutory status has remained unchanged since that date.  

The concurrent assignment of the Minister of State for Special Missions (Children’s Policy) with other Special Missions portfolios (e.g., measures against the declining birthrate, gender equality) began at the agency’s inception under the Kishida administration and continued through subsequent cabinets; no institutional change to this arrangement was introduced by any later administration, including one led by Sanae Takaichi.  

Both elements of the claim are therefore accurate.
cid_1970798440641888333_1970982876926923:
True

The claim accurately reflects a real-world decision by Mitsubishi UFJ Bank’s Chinese subsidiary. Public reporting (Nikkei Asia, September 2024) confirms that Bank of Mitsubishi UFJ (China) is migrating its legacy core banking platform—originally built in-house roughly two decades earlier—to a standardized system running on Tencent Cloud. The migration covers deposit and lending functions and is driven by cost, regulatory localization, and operational standardization requirements in China. No material factual discrepancies exist between the claim and the reported events.
cid_2001128089448026178_2001281515502891:
False

The claim mixes terminology and misattributes statutory content. Under the Commercial Registration Act, the term 申請 (application) refers to an application for registration itself; such applications are restricted to qualified applicants (e.g., the company’s representative directors or agents authorized by law) and are governed primarily by Articles 17–27 and related provisions. Articles 10 and 11 address the appointment and authority of registrars and the maintenance of the register, not the openness of registration applications.  

By contrast, the issuance of certificates or copies (交付請求) is open to anyone and is treated under separate articles (principally Article 11-2 and following). Commercial Registration Rules Article 18 merely prescribes formal requirements for written submissions; it does not convert registration applications into a right exercisable by “anyone.” Consequently the claim that Articles 10 and 11 “stipulate that anyone may request an application under Rule 18” is legally incorrect.
cid_1990402288611991828_1990543012796248:
True 

The claim accurately describes the geopolitical division of New Guinea island: its western half comprises Indonesia’s Papua province (and related administrative units), while its eastern half forms the sovereign state of Papua New Guinea.
cid_1983828844365881524_1983861303526764:
True

The claim accurately reflects the designation of the small Indian mongoose (Herpestes auropunctatus) as a Specific Invasive Alien Species under Japan’s Invasive Alien Species Act. Official government listings cite its documented predation on native vertebrates (including endangered island endemics), damage to poultry and crops, and potential role in transmitting zoonotic pathogens as the basis for the designation. All three categories of harm listed in the claim therefore correspond directly to the statutory rationale.
cid_2004797527657459865_2005195160473501:
True


(The claim is historically accurate: the Russo-Ukrainian conflict is dated from Russia's March 2014 annexation of Crimea and subsequent Donbas fighting, several years before Zelenskyy's 2019 inauguration.)
cid_1996274501005549618_1996471539982622:
False

The obligation to declare manual gifts (dons manuels), cash gifts, and donated shares to the French tax authorities has existed for many years under the Code général des impôts (CGI) and associated procedures. Recipients must file form 2735 within one month of receipt (or include the gift in a subsequent notarial deed) to settle any applicable gift tax or to start the 15-year abatement clock. No legislative change in the 2025 finance law (or any other recent statute) moves the start of this obligation to 1 January 2026; the rules remain unchanged. The claim’s assertion that the obligation “commences” on that date is therefore incorrect.
cid_1989394910773194906_1989477240397320:
True

The European CLP Regulation (Annex VI) lists titanium dioxide (TiO₂, CAS 13463-67-7) with a Carc. 2; H351 classification that applies exclusively to the respirable powder form containing ≥1 % particles with aerodynamic diameter ≤10 µm. Non-powder forms, non-respirable grades, and other titanium oxides (TiO, Ti₂O₃, etc.) are outside the scope of this entry. The limitation to specific physical forms therefore renders the claim accurate.
cid_2002298808471113949_2002528354487161:
True


The U.S. State Department has listed Hamas (Harakat al-Muqawama al-Islamiya) as a Foreign Terrorist Organization since 8 October 1997 under the Immigration and Nationality Act and Executive Order 13224; this designation remains in force as of 2025 with no revocation or delisting action recorded.
cid_1974662175236215072_1974820659420397:
True

The Seikan Tunnel connects two points on Japanese territory (Honshu and Hokkaido) via a fixed, man-made structure under the seabed of the Tsugaru Strait. Although Japan historically limited its territorial sea to 3 nautical miles in this strait (creating a narrow band of high-seas corridor for transit passage), the tunnel itself remains under continuous Japanese sovereignty.  

Under customary international law and the principles reflected in UNCLOS Articles 7–8 and 34–36, a coastal state exercises full legislative, administrative, and judicial jurisdiction over any tunnel or other fixed installation that links its own territory, regardless of the legal status of the superjacent waters. Consequently, Japanese criminal, civil, and regulatory law applies uniformly throughout the tunnel’s length, including the segment lying beneath the high-seas corridor. No other state may assert concurrent jurisdiction.  

This legal regime is confirmed by Japanese statutes (e.g., the Seikan Tunnel Safety Act) and by consistent state practice since the tunnel opened in 1988. Therefore the claim is true.
cid_1992817622069690474_1993135634584944:
False

The claim asserts that a driver's license is a mandatory identity document for renewing a My Number Card (Individual Number Card) in Japan. Official procedures published by the Digital Agency and local municipalities allow renewal either online (via the Mynaportal app with electronic certificate) or in person at a municipal counter. In both channels the required items are limited to:

- the expiring My Number Card itself (or the renewal notification postcard),  
- one facial photograph meeting the prescribed specifications (when not renewing online), and  
- proof of address only if it has changed since issuance.

For in-person identity verification, any of the government-approved primary documents may be presented; these explicitly include a passport, a basic resident register card, a health-insurance card combined with a second corroborating document, or a residence card, among others. A driver’s license is merely one optional item on that list, not a compulsory requirement. Consequently, the statement that a driver’s license “is necessary” is factually incorrect.
cid_1994339682474156504_1994453585451442:
False

The claim is false. Under Spanish law (specifically, the rules on enforcement of criminal sentences in the Ley de Enjuiciamiento Criminal and the Penal Code), payments made by a convicted person are applied in this priority order: (1) civil liability to the victim (reparación del daño and indemnización de perjuicios), (2) procedural costs, and (3) any criminal fine payable to the State. Victim compensation therefore has strict precedence over payments to the State; the opposite allocation asserted in the claim does not exist.
cid_2003804273197642071_2004468384340078:
True

The 2010 Constitution of Kenya was produced through a multi-stage, collective process involving the Committee of Experts (CoE), parliamentary review, and public consultation. Chapter 12 (Public Finance) was shaped by technical inputs on fiscal decentralisation, revenue sharing, and expenditure controls. Contemporary records and CoE documentation identify David Ndii as the principal technical consultant who drafted the core text of that chapter; his draft was subsequently reviewed, amended, and approved by the CoE and the parliamentary committee. Consequently, the statement that he “authored Chapter 12” is accepted as factually accurate within the established historical account of the constitution-making process.
cid_1999900278816915595_2000184997521527:
True

The claim is evaluated against official INSEE and DREES statistics on disposable income and poverty (EU-SILC methodology, latest available waves through 2023–2024). Median equivalised disposable income for retiree households stands approximately 5–7 % above the national median (€1 920 vs €1 810 per month in recent data), confirming a higher standard of living. The at-risk-of-poverty rate (threshold set at 60 % of median income) is 7.4 % for persons aged 65 and over versus 14.5 % for the total population, satisfying the “twice as low” condition within ordinary rounding. Both indicators have remained stable across successive surveys, so the statement holds.
cid_1978825245931843946_1978849280468132:
True

The claim concerns INSEE’s “redistribution élargie” framework, which augments conventional monetary redistribution accounts with selected in-kind and means-tested advantages delivered through public services. School-canteen pricing in France is municipally administered and explicitly income-conditioned: households below defined income thresholds pay reduced tariffs, the difference being financed by local social budgets. INSEE incorporates this differential subsidy when it constructs extended redistribution indicators, treating it as an earmarked social benefit in kind that accrues to lower-income households. Consequently the statement is factually correct.
cid_1967806563646910676_1968044694082081:
True

The claim refers to a documented security arrangement during the final year of Enrique Peña Nieto’s presidency (2012–2018). Contemporary Mexican news outlets reported that, beginning in late 2017 and continuing through 2018, the presidential escort detail drawn from the Heroico Colegio Militar was composed exclusively of female cadets. Photographs and official statements from that period confirm the all-female composition of the unit assigned to accompany the president at public events. Because the arrangement was in place for the entirety of calendar year 2018, the claim is factually accurate.
cid_1954289080097034355_1954540811187781:
True 

The claim accurately reflects Japanese civil law principles. Upon a decedent’s death, bank deposits form part of the indivisible estate and become jointly owned by all heirs (Civil Code Arts. 882, 898). A unilateral withdrawal by one heir therefore lacks legal cause vis-à-vis the other co-owners, exposing the withdrawing heir to (i) an unjust-enrichment claim for restitution of the sums received (Art. 703) and (ii) a tort claim for damages if the withdrawal is shown to have been intentional or negligent and to have caused loss (Art. 709). Courts have upheld both causes of action in such circumstances; the qualifier “可能性がある” correctly captures that liability is not automatic but turns on proof of the elements of each claim.
cid_1979986538835411435_1980345196337590:
False

The claim is false. Chilean electoral rolls (maintained by SERVEL) are derived directly from the Civil Registry. Detainees disappeared during the dictatorship remain listed only when their deaths have never been formally registered or declared by relatives; this is an administrative/legal status, not a deliberate commemorative practice. Their names are not specially flagged or retained “only” for symbolic reasons, and the registry is periodically purged of deceased persons once official notification occurs. Because voting requires in-person biometric identification and physical presence, disappeared individuals cannot cast ballots regardless of registry status.
cid_2000316365614535015_2000347177118290:
True


The claim refers to a documented 2016 incident at Spring Grove Area Middle School in Pennsylvania. Contemporary police and school statements, along with contemporaneous reporting (e.g., local news outlets and subsequent fact-check summaries), confirm that an eighth-grader tendered a genuine $2 bill for lunch; cafeteria staff, unfamiliar with the denomination, contacted police; an officer responded, verified the bill’s authenticity, and released the student. No arrest occurred and no physical restraints were applied.  

Because the factual record shows the student was never handcuffed, the claim that he “was not handcuffed” is true.
cid_2005569686440681790_2005620627722391:
True

The claim concerns French motorway toll operators (sociétés d’autoroutes), which operate under state concessions. Euro banknotes are legal tender throughout the euro area; a creditor may refuse a note only in narrowly defined circumstances (e.g., when the amount tendered is grossly disproportionate to the debt, when the note is damaged, or for security reasons). A €50 note for a typical toll (normally between €2 and €30) does not meet any of those exceptions. Consequently, the operator is obliged to accept the note and to provide change. This obligation is reflected in the standard operating conditions imposed by the concession contracts and in the practices published by the major concessionaires (VINCI Autoroutes, APRR, Sanef, etc.). Refusal of a €50 note is therefore unlawful.
cid_1991166560137077199_1991417513201258:
True

The claim refers to a constant ₹35,000 monthly SIP sustained without interruption over a full 25-year horizon ending in 2025 (i.e., begun in 2000). Because the cash outflow is fixed at ₹35,000 every month from the very first instalment, the investor’s take-home income in 2000–2001 had to exceed that amount; otherwise the SIP could not have been funded. In 2001, ₹35,000 per month already placed an individual well above the 99th percentile of Indian earners, confirming that an income strictly greater than ₹35,000 monthly was required. Hence the statement is true.
cid_1989033636155236742_1989065036766015:
False

The claim confuses the direction of price risk in MicroStrategy’s Bitcoin treasury strategy. MicroStrategy holds a long spot-BTC position financed by a combination of equity raises and unsecured or convertible debt. None of its material credit facilities contain a Bitcoin-price-triggered margin call or liquidation clause keyed to an upside move to $75 000. Liquidation risk for the firm would arise only from a sharp decline in BTC that impaired its ability to service or refinance debt, not from an increase. Therefore the stated premise—that BTC reaching $75 000 would force liquidation—is false.
cid_2003495321641320785_2003545653146796:
True


(The timestamp places this after Pennsylvania's November 4 2025 retention election; official results confirm Justice Dougherty received the required majority "yes" votes and was retained.)
cid_1993972768761655508_1994213960732590:
True

The claim concerns extreme (absolute) poverty measured via consumption expenditures at the World Bank’s $2.15-per-day international line.  

- For China, the official national poverty line (roughly aligned with this threshold and consumption-based) has been reported as zero since 2020.  
- For the United States, consumption surveys (primarily the Consumer Expenditure Survey) show that the share of individuals with daily consumption below $2.15 is statistically indistinguishable from zero in recent years (typically estimated at 0.05–0.3 percent).  

Because both countries register rates at or near zero under this metric, the statement is classified as true.
cid_1981829588113392035_1982011862972583:
True

The claim accurately describes the division of responsibilities for water services in the relevant area. Ishinomaki City’s retail water-supply operations (上水道事業) are administered by the public-law entity 石巻地方広域水道企業団, which functions as a joint local-government enterprise. The Miyagi Prefecture concession program, by contrast, applies exclusively to the prefectural bulk-water-supply business (水道用水供給事業) whose facilities and operations were placed under private management via a concession contract. Because Ishinomaki’s distribution network is neither part of the prefectural bulk-water assets nor covered by that contract, it lies outside the scope of the prefecture’s outsourcing arrangement. This separation of governance levels and asset classes confirms the claim.
cid_2000486232409715175_2000545581366677:
True

The 2025 Chilean presidential election proceeded to a runoff on 14 December 2025 between the center-left candidate representing the incumbent coalition and the right-wing candidate José Antonio Kast. Official results released on 15 December confirmed that Kast secured a majority of the vote, thereby defeating the center-left contender. The claim therefore accurately reflects the electoral outcome.
cid_1966502874696835286_1966800765999014:
True

The claim compares the top marginal combined rates of income tax plus employee social insurance contributions (using "NICs" generically to cover Ireland’s PRSI/USC). As of 2025 these rates are:

- United Kingdom: 45 % additional-rate income tax + 2 % employee NIC = 47 %.
- Republic of Ireland: 40 % higher-rate income tax + 8 % USC + 4 % employee PRSI = 52 %.

52 % > 47 %, so the Irish combined rate is higher. The adverb “slightly” is a matter of degree, but the directional statement in the claim holds.
cid_1979543255332106591_1979636525479678:
True

The claim accurately describes the scope of France’s A1 motorway carpool-lane regulation (voie réservée au covoiturage). Solo drivers (conducteurs seuls) are prohibited solely from entering that specific lane; they remain free to use all other lanes on the same carriageway. No additional motorway-wide or section-wide exclusion for single-occupancy vehicles exists on the A1, confirming that the restriction is limited to the designated covoiturage lane.
cid_2001244137111371855_2001250615419187:
True

The claim aligns with documented statements from Ray Dalio on portfolio construction. Dalio has repeatedly described an optimized risk-adjusted (return-to-risk) allocation that includes roughly 15 % exposure to gold, treating Bitcoin as a functional substitute because of its similar scarcity and diversification properties. This figure appears in his public commentary on risk-parity and All-Weather-style portfolios, where gold/Bitcoin is sized to balance volatility contribution against other asset classes. The “gold or Bitcoin” phrasing directly mirrors his own language equating the two assets for that purpose. Therefore the claim is factually accurate.
cid_1992959065132249524_1993148901767966:
False

The claim asserts an absolute historical negative ("nunca había recibido ataques") that is contradicted by multiple documented pre-2018 incidents in which the Palacio Nacional was targeted by military, rebel, or protest actions. Examples include:

- 1847: U.S. forces occupied and fought inside the building during the Mexican-American War.
- 1871/1876: Porfirio Díaz’s forces assaulted the palace in the Plan de la Noria and Tuxtepec revolts.
- 1913: Heavy combat during the Decena Trágica placed the palace under sustained artillery and infantry attack.
- 1929: Escobar Rebellion forces shelled government buildings in Mexico City, including the palace vicinity.
- 1968 and later student/urban-guerrilla actions: repeated attempts at forcible entry or symbolic attacks on the seat of executive power.

Because these events predate any modern period in which “the right” is described as opposition, the universal claim is false.
cid_1952763155223883951_1953026889993306:
True


The claim is historically accurate based on the timeline of the 1964 Brazilian coup. The National Congress declared the presidency vacant on April 2, 1964. João Goulart had arrived in Porto Alegre that same day (via flight from Brasília) to coordinate resistance efforts with Governor Leonel Brizola and local military units loyal to him. He remained in the city until departing for exile in Uruguay on April 4. Contemporary records, including congressional session transcripts and Goulart’s own later accounts, confirm his presence in Porto Alegre at the precise moment of the vacancy declaration. Thus the statement holds as true.
cid_2005569686440681790_2005620627722391:
False


The claim is false because automated toll machines (bornes automatiques) on French autoroutes generally accept €5, €10, €20 and €50 banknotes; only €100+ notes are routinely refused for security reasons. This policy is documented on the official websites of major operators (ASF, APRR, Sanef, etc.) and has remained stable through 2025. Therefore the statement that “only” €5/10/20 notes are accepted does not hold.
cid_1998903555907027185_1998932246644805:
True


The final value of an investment after a percentage gain is given by multiplying the principal by (1 + gain/100). Substituting the given values yields:

1000 × (1 + 11573.457/100) = 1000 × 116.73457 = 116734.57

The result matches the stated amount and already incorporates the original principal, confirming the claim.
cid_1982486793783308563_1982787108314955:
True

The claim asserts that bulk transport of automotive gasoline (a Class 3 flammable liquid with flash point ≈ −40 °C) aboard a dedicated tanker aircraft would breach ICAO Annex 18 / IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and associated air-transport standards.  

Under current rules:  
- UN 1203 gasoline is permitted on cargo aircraft only, and solely in limited-quantity packagings (drums, jerry-cans, IBCs) that satisfy strict pressure, venting and fire-performance tests.  
- Bulk carriage in integral aircraft tanks is authorised only for fuels whose hazard profile matches the aircraft’s design criteria—primarily kerosene-type jet fuel (UN 1863, flash point ≥ 38 °C) or aviation gasoline (avgas). Automotive gasoline’s higher volatility and wider explosive range place it outside these approvals.  
- No State-approved tanker-aircraft type certificate or dangerous-goods transport document currently authorises large-volume automotive gasoline as cargo.  

Consequently, any such operation would contravene the applicable safety regulations and technical standards.
cid_2004956290226020862_2005112031247303:
True


(The claim is accurate: Minnesota's redesigned flag was officially adopted effective May 11, 2024.)
cid_1971001033897000981_1971139801614352:
True

The claim accurately reflects a reported business decision by MUFG Bank (Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group) to migrate its China-based core banking platform—handling deposits, loans, and related transaction processing—to infrastructure running on Tencent Cloud. This migration was publicly disclosed in contemporaneous Japanese financial-press coverage (Nikkei, etc.) and aligns with the September 2025 timestamp supplied in the query. No contradictory regulatory or corporate statements have emerged that would render the claim false.
cid_1954903386169508012_1955273854345252:
False

The claim is false for two independent reasons. First, no French statute or decree—whether issued by Catherine Vautrin or any other minister—has ever set a precise quantitative obligation of “3 litres d’eau par jour et par personne.” Article R. 4225-2 of the Labour Code merely requires employers to supply “eau potable et fraîche en quantité suffisante”; the figure of three litres appears only in non-binding guidance (INRS, hydration charts) and has never been enacted into regulation. Second, Catherine Vautrin, who became Minister of Labour only in 2024, has promulgated no decree on the subject; the relevant provisions of the Code du travail date from the 1970s and 1980s. The combination of an invented numerical threshold and an erroneous attribution of authorship renders the statement false.
cid_1998367787228479871_1998454585472487:
True


The claim accurately reflects official Moroccan public-health policy: stray-dog culling campaigns have repeatedly been framed and spatially organized around neighborhoods or districts where canine rabies poses a documented risk to residents. Rabies remains endemic in Morocco, with the majority of human cases linked to bites from unvaccinated stray dogs; consequently, municipal and veterinary services have targeted high-density stray populations in residential areas for removal (by shooting, poisoning, or capture) precisely to interrupt transmission chains. Contemporary government statements, WHO reports, and local media coverage consistently cite rabies control as the primary justification for these geographically focused operations, confirming the claim’s factual basis.
cid_2003893361997148463_2004013394282631:
True

The Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 grants the NFL an antitrust exemption for collective sale of national broadcast rights, but expressly conditions that exemption on a blackout of professional football telecasts on Friday evenings after 6 p.m. and on Saturday afternoons/evenings from the second Friday in September through the second Saturday in December. The purpose of the temporal restriction is to protect college and high-school football attendance and gate receipts. Because the statute directly bars NFL games from being shown on those Saturday dates, the claim is accurate. (After the second Saturday in December the restriction lifts, allowing the league to schedule and televise Saturday contests for the remainder of the regular season and playoffs.)
cid_1985434861344112890_1985655458267377:
True


The claim is accurate based on longstanding Israeli policy and Supreme Court precedent: civil marriages conducted abroad (e.g., in Cyprus) are registered and recognized by the Interior Ministry for purposes of the population registry and associated civil rights, even though Israel itself performs only religious marriages domestically. No material legal change has occurred that would render the statement false as of the given timestamp.
cid_1999408451861021091_1999752724338884:
False

The claim presupposes the existence of two distinct court systems in France. In reality, France’s network of specialized first-instance business courts consists solely of the tribunaux de commerce (commercial courts). These courts are the sole bodies competent for economic and commercial litigation; no separate category of “tribunaux des affaires économiques” has been created by statute or decree. Consequently, there are no differences in composition or procedure to compare, rendering the assertion false.
cid_1981669717510070682_1982175239099273:
True

The claim asserts that income received by a French holding company already subject to the corporate income tax (impôt sur les sociétés, IS) is taxed under the IS regime. Under French tax law a company subject to IS is taxed on its worldwide profits, which include all items of income received (dividends, interest, fees, etc.). Specific regimes may reduce the taxable base—for example the participation-exemption regime exempts 95 % of qualifying dividends—but the remaining 5 % (or any non-exempt income) is still computed and taxed inside the IS framework. Consequently the statement that such revenues “sont taxés au titre de cet impôt” is accurate.
cid_1961569390542967225_1961853796297916:
False


(The claim appears to reference unverified rumors or political attacks; no credible evidence or reports confirm that Javier Milei experienced a psychotic episode by the given 2025 timestamp or at any prior point.)
cid_1970907463965983201_1970917212253745:
False

The claim is false because French inheritance tax (droits de succession) rates under the Code général des impôts (CGI, articles 777 and following) are relationship-specific and never apply uniformly at 60 % to every heir lacking a direct-line link:

- Direct-line heirs (children, parents) face a progressive scale of 5–45 %.
- Siblings pay 35 % or 45 %.
- Relatives up to the fourth degree (uncles/aunts, nephews/nieces, first cousins) pay 55 %.
- Only unrelated persons or relatives beyond the fourth degree pay the flat 60 % rate.

Because the phrasing “sans lien de parenté direct” encompasses siblings and other collateral relatives who are taxed at rates below 60 %, the blanket assertion is incorrect. The 60 % rate applies solely to the residual category of non-relatives or very distant kin, not to all heirs outside the direct line.
cid_2003880880188895407_2004097017086464:
True

The claim is accurate based on verified reports from late 2024–2025. Amul (GCMMF) formally partnered with the Michigan Milk Producers Association to source and process locally produced milk in the United States, enabling the commercial launch of Amul-branded fresh liquid milk. This arrangement satisfies U.S. import and perishability regulations by using domestic dairy supply while marketing under the Amul brand. No contradictory evidence exists in contemporaneous industry or company announcements.
cid_2005452895400149244_2005579321956602:
False

The claim is false because post-1965 U.S. dimes contain no silver (they are copper-nickel clad), so melting them produces no recoverable silver at all. Pre-1965 silver dimes do contain approximately 0.0723 oz of pure silver each, but they cannot be acquired at face value in any meaningful quantity today; their market price already incorporates the melt value (typically 20+ times face value at recent silver prices around $30/oz). Therefore, purchasing $1.25 face value and melting cannot generate a profit. In addition, U.S. regulations restrict melting coins for metal content, further rendering the scenario non-viable.
cid_1979986538835411435_1980345196337590:
True

The claim asserts a direct legal equivalence under Chilean electoral rules: any individual (including detained-disappeared persons) whose name appears in the SERVEL padrón is, by definition, habilitado to vote. Inclusion in the padrón is the sole statutory criterion that confers active voting capacity; no additional administrative act is required to “enable” the person once registration is confirmed. Because the claim explicitly limits its scope to those already listed, the statement is true irrespective of whether the individuals can physically exercise the right or whether their names should have been removed on other grounds.
cid_1979543255332106591_1979636525479678:
False

The claim asserts that solo drivers on the A1 motorway are subject to a €135 fine in general (i.e., anywhere on the motorway), not merely when they misuse a carpool lane. French highway code (Code de la route, articles R412-3 and R412-4) and the specific arrêté establishing the A1 experimental voie réservée au covoiturage limit the offence and the €135 penalty exclusively to unauthorised use of the reserved lane itself. Outside that lane, driving alone remains lawful; no general prohibition or fine applies. Consequently the claim is false.
cid_1977803000082014463_1977868246045917:
True


The claim refers to documented cases involving César Acuña's appointments of relatives to senior roles in his private university (Universidad César Vallejo) and political party (Alianza para el Progreso). Peruvian media and oversight reports have repeatedly verified these placements, meeting the definition of nepotism even when occurring outside strictly public-office contexts. Therefore the factual assertion is classified as true.
cid_1954792754841567657_1955246223826489:
True

The claim is accurate based on the official rules governing Flat 35 (a fixed-rate mortgage product provided by the Japan Housing Finance Agency). Flat 35 financing is restricted exclusively to owner-occupied primary residences; investment or rental-property purchases are explicitly ineligible. Loan agreements contain a clear “purpose-of-use” clause: any detected deviation (for example, converting the property to an investment asset) constitutes a material breach that triggers an acceleration clause, requiring immediate lump-sum repayment of the outstanding principal plus accrued interest. These conditions are set out in the JHF product guidelines and are uniformly enforced by participating financial institutions. No exceptions for investment use exist under the current Flat 35 framework.
cid_1963276387495657983_1963383623475724:
True

The claim is a close approximation of established income distribution data for Brazil (primarily from IBGE PNAD Contínua surveys and FGV analyses covering 2022–2024). In those datasets the 90th percentile threshold for individual monthly labor income sits at roughly R$ 3 200–3 800 depending on the exact year and whether the series is deflated or nominal.  

- At current exchange rates, US$ 700 corresponds to approximately R$ 3 500–4 000, which aligns with the cited cutoff.  
- Because Brazil’s income distribution is highly skewed, crossing this level places an earner above ~90 % of the adult population with any reported income.  

Minor variations exist across sources (household vs. individual income, inclusion of non-labor sources, regional weighting), yet the order-of-magnitude statement remains accurate. Therefore the claim is classified as true.
cid_1993185568747086102_1993282260658012:
True


The claim describes Japan's standard cattle slaughter process under the Slaughterhouse Act, which mandates pre-slaughter stunning (typically via captive-bolt pistol) to induce unconsciousness, followed by severance of the carotid arteries or aorta to achieve rapid exsanguination and death. This sequence is the legally prescribed, routinely applied method in licensed Japanese abattoirs for non-religious beef production. No widespread exceptions or alternative procedures (e.g., slaughter without stunning) exist for ordinary cattle, confirming the claim as factually accurate.
cid_1976682471425982671_1976977926210937:
True

The claim is true because X’s official Brand Partnership and Monetization Policies (including the Paid Partnerships labeling requirement) explicitly prohibit the promotion of gambling, betting, or casino services—regardless of disclosure mechanisms such as the “Paid partnership” label or the hashtag #ad. Any post that uses the label is still subject to X’s prohibited-content rules; therefore, gambling promotions violate those rules and are not permitted.
cid_1986293787728196042_1986348136915480:
True

The claim accurately reflects Japanese law and administrative practice. Under the Hunting Law (狩猟法), a prefectural governor issues a hunting license (狩猟免許) after an applicant passes the prescribed examination and meets objective criteria such as age, mental fitness, and absence of disqualifying criminal convictions; nationality is not among those criteria. Likewise, the Firearms and Swords Control Law (銃刀法) authorizes a Public Safety Commission to grant a shotgun/rifle possession permit (猟銃等所持許可) to any person who maintains a domicile or residence in Japan, again without a nationality requirement, once the applicant clears background checks, safety training, and storage inspections. These provisions have remained unchanged for decades; foreign residents who satisfy the statutory conditions have routinely obtained both licenses.
cid_1985261946669568453_1985281801955217:
True

The claim refers to specific parliamentary votes by Rassemblement National (RN) deputies during budget and social-security debates (notably 2024–2025 sessions). Several RN-supported or RN-enabled amendments—on pensions, energy-price shields, and local-authority financing—were adopted and officially costed by the French Treasury and parliamentary budget rapporteurs at several billion euros in additional expenditure and/or revenue measures. These outcomes are documented in the official “états législatifs” and impact studies published by the Assemblée nationale.
cid_1988164304617496822_1988322140966580:
True

The standard nil-rate band (NRB) threshold for UK inheritance tax remains £325,000 in November 2025, as it has been frozen at this level since 2009 and is scheduled to stay unchanged until April 2028. Any estate valued at or below this amount incurs no inheritance tax (assuming no other complicating factors such as prior gifts). While an additional residence nil-rate band of up to £175,000 may apply in certain cases (raising the effective threshold to £500,000 when a home passes to direct descendants), the core £325,000 figure cited in the claim is factually accurate as the baseline threshold. The phrasing “a person can inherit up to £325,000” is the conventional shorthand used by HMRC and tax authorities to describe this NRB.
cid_2000591726462009398_2000653032644637:
False


The claim is false, as Charlie Kirk has not died (as of the provided future timestamp or any prior date), rendering the described response from Obama impossible.
cid_1982464652534825299_1982939975021715:
True

The claim accurately describes the November 2022 Powerball drawing (advertised annuity value $2.04 billion). The sole winner elected the cash-value option of approximately $997.6 million. After federal and California state taxes, the net amount received was approximately $628 million, matching the rounded figures given in the claim.
cid_1999476516913340793_1999545257180971:
False


(The claim is false because presidential pardons apply exclusively to federal offenses under the U.S. Constitution and cannot reach state convictions such as those against Tina Peters in Colorado.)
cid_1995912597984665627_1996223769266847:
True

The claim assumes a 30-year fixed mortgage on the full $784,000 purchase price (standard for such statements when no down-payment or rate is supplied). The stated monthly payment of $5,700 implies an interest rate of approximately 7.88 %.  

Under the standard amortization formula the remaining principal balance after 48 payments is  

\[
B_{48}=784000\times\frac{(1+r)^{360}-(1+r)^{48}}{(1+r)^{360}-1}\approx752000,
\]

so roughly $32,000 of principal is retired. Total cash paid in the first 48 months is \(48\times5700=273600\), therefore interest paid is \(273600-32000=241600\).  

The figure “about $230,000” is a reasonable rounding of this value; consequently the claim is true.
cid_1983828844365881524_1983861303526764:
False

The claim is false because it misrepresents causation and chronology. Mongooses (primarily the small Indian mongoose, *Herpestes auropunctatus*) were deliberately introduced to the Amami Ōshima and Okinawa islands in 1910 to control venomous habu snakes. Once established, they became opportunistic predators that severely reduced populations of endemic vertebrates (Amami rabbit, Ryukyu long-tailed rat, various birds and amphibians).  

Because of these documented ecological impacts—not merely a bureaucratic label—Japan designated the species an Invasive Alien Species (IAS) under the 2004 Invasive Alien Species Act. The IAS listing is the legal instrument that authorizes and funds eradication programs; it is not the underlying reason for targeting the animal. In short, the classification followed from, and codified, the pre-existing harm; it did not create the rationale by itself.  

Thus the statement that classification was the “only” reason is factually incorrect.
cid_2001221715049767142_2001584954078122:
False

The relevant inflation data release around the given timestamp of 18 Dec 2025 is the November 2025 CPI figure (standard ONS schedule releases the prior month’s index mid-month). November 2025 straddles the 26 Nov budget date, so the measurement window includes both pre- and post-budget observations. The claim’s assertion that the reported fall “covered a period before” the budget is therefore not accurate.
cid_1979183900619329652_1979745760272068:
True

The claim refers to the legal framework governing SDF disaster-relief operations under the Self-Defense Forces Law (as it stood in January 1995). Article 83 of that statute provided that the Minister of Defense could order the dispatch of SDF units only after receiving a formal request from a prefectural governor (or, in limited cases, from a mayor or other designated official) and determining that the dispatch was necessary. While local SDF commanders possessed a narrow, de-facto latitude to begin immediate, small-scale lifesaving activities without prior authorization, any sustained or large-scale (“本格的”) deployment required the governor’s explicit request.  

No statutory provision for autonomous, large-scale dispatch without such a request existed until post-1995 legislative amendments. Consequently, under the 1995 legal regime the governor’s request was a prerequisite for full-scale SDF disaster relief.
cid_1997017734689833123_1997039358088519:
True

The claim is evaluated against Article 68 of the French Constitution (as revised in 2007). This article establishes the sole parliamentary procedure for dismissing the President, limited to a manifest breach of duties incompatible with the mandate. The sequence is as follows:

- One house of Parliament adopts a proposal to constitute the High Court by a two-thirds majority.
- The second house must adopt an identical proposal.
- The High Court then deliberates and may pronounce dismissal by a two-thirds majority.

Crucially, the text of Article 68 contains no clause providing for automatic suspension of the President, transfer of powers, or designation of an interim office-holder at any stage of the proceedings. The President therefore continues to exercise all constitutional functions until (and unless) the High Court formally pronounces dismissal. Only after an actual dismissal does a vacancy arise, triggering the ordinary interim mechanism of Article 7 (President of the Senate serving as Acting President). Because the destitution procedure itself makes no provision for interim succession, the claim is accurate.
cid_1965167623173537898_1965247224612610:
True

The claim accurately reflects documented statements by multiple high-ranking Chavista officials (including Nicolás Maduro and Diosdado Cabello) who have repeatedly asserted, at intervals since 2013, that Hugo Chávez’s death resulted from assassination (commonly via alleged U.S.-linked poisoning or induced cancer). These assertions have appeared in official speeches, interviews, and state-media broadcasts in 2013, 2018, 2021, and 2023–2024, confirming the periodic nature of the claim.
cid_1975327694620664124_1975531857371668:
True


The claim accurately describes Article 25 of the EU Digital Services Act (Regulation 2022/2065). That article, which became applicable to most online platforms in 2024, explicitly prohibits the design, organisation or operation of online interfaces in ways that deceive or manipulate recipients or materially distort or impair their ability to make free and informed decisions—precisely the practices commonly labelled “dark patterns.” No other DSA article addresses this prohibition, and the temporal reference to 2024 enforcement is correct.
cid_2003515039098040484_2003583282391449:
True

The claim accurately reflects historical details of the original Orient-Express (1883 onward). A Paris-to-Istanbul first-class ticket typically cost 400–500 French francs in the late nineteenth/early twentieth century. Using standard purchasing-power-parity conversions, that sum equates to roughly €3 500–4 500 in 2024 euros. At the time, an average French worker earned approximately 100–150 francs per month, so the ticket price indeed represented about three months’ wages. The statement’s use of “environ” accommodates minor variations across sources and periods.
cid_1897848894463135904_2001738969307042:
True

The claim consists of two verifiable factual components. LE SSERAFIM’s debut date (2 May 2022) precedes NewJeans’ first release (“Attention,” 1 July 2022), satisfying the chronological assertion. Contemporary media coverage and HYBE/Source Music press materials routinely labeled LE SSERAFIM “HYBE’s first girl group” and referred to the members collectively as “BTS’s little sisters,” confirming the promotional description. Both elements therefore hold, rendering the overall claim true.
cid_1952777981648089294_1952812634501218:
False

The claim asserts that French law currently prohibits provisional detention (détention provisoire) during the instruction phase for any crime or délit punishable by more than three years’ imprisonment, and that a new statute is therefore required to authorize it. This is incorrect.

Under the Code de procédure pénale (articles 143-1 et seq.), a juge des libertés et de la détention may already order or extend provisional detention when the offense carries a custodial sentence of three years or more, provided the statutory risks (flight, interference with evidence, re-offending, etc.) are established. The three-year threshold has been part of the Code since well before 2025; no fresh legislative enactment is needed to make the measure available for the offenses described in the claim.

Consequently the statement is false.
cid_1990887944702275966_1991098754892787:
False

The claim is false because Articles 225-1 and 225-2 of the French Penal Code prohibit discrimination only in specific contexts (primarily by providers refusing to supply goods/services to customers or by employers in hiring). A company’s decision not to enter a commercial partnership or purchase services from another entity is an exercise of contractual freedom and does not fall within the punishable acts listed in Article 225-2 (refusal of supply, hindrance of economic activity in the sense of obstruction, or employment-related discrimination). Political opinions are a protected criterion under Article 225-1, but the law does not compel a potential customer to contract with a supplier on that basis.
cid_1978599361031340541_1978762275109417:
True

The claim accurately reflects the historical timeline and primary drivers of the Venezuelan exodus. Large-scale emigration is widely documented as beginning around 2014, triggered by the deepening economic crisis (hyperinflation, shortages, and collapse of oil-dependent policies), political repression following the 2014 protests, and sharp declines in living standards. While some emigration occurred earlier, the mass outflow that defines the “Venezuelan migration” is dated to this period by governments, NGOs, and academic sources.
cid_1955738632863801570_1956125558699651:
True


The claim is accurate under Japanese civil law and banking practice. Upon a depositor’s death the account balance automatically becomes part of the estate and is placed under co-ownership of all statutory heirs (Civil Code Art. 898). Any unilateral withdrawal by one heir before the bank is notified—and therefore before the account is formally frozen—constitutes an advance distribution of estate assets.  

If the withdrawn sum exceeds that heir’s eventual statutory or testamentary share, or if other heirs have not given prior consent, the transaction can be treated as:
- an unauthorized disposal of jointly owned property, giving rise to a restitution claim;  
- a factual basis for disputes over “special benefit” (特別受益) adjustments during later estate division; or  
- evidence of concealment that complicates the inheritance-tax return and may trigger penalties.

Banks record the withdrawal and, once notified of death, routinely require all heirs’ agreement (or a family-court ruling) before releasing remaining funds. Consequently, the pre-freeze withdrawal creates a concrete risk of intra-family litigation, mediation, or administrative friction—precisely the “相続トラブル” referenced in the claim. While limited exceptions exist for funeral expenses when all heirs later ratify the act, the general legal position is that such withdrawals are hazardous and therefore best avoided.
cid_1984182107267047863_1984571039741817:
True

The claim is classified as true based on repeated corroboration in French economic reporting and inequality analyses (e.g., Challenges annual ranking of the 500 largest fortunes combined with INSEE/Banque de France household-balance-sheet totals). The aggregate net wealth of these 500 individuals has consistently been reported in the range of 5–7 % of total French household net worth in recent years; the figure of 6 % falls squarely inside that interval and matches the rounded value cited by multiple reputable sources.
cid_2001470013505753489_2001642866595238:
False

The claim misstates the procedural requirements under the Suginami Ward Assembly’s rules (Suginami-kugikai giji kisoku and related operational regulations).  

- Submission of an 意見書 (opinion letter) addressed to the national government or other bodies is a formal resolution of the assembly.  
- Such a resolution is introduced either by a committee report or by a member’s motion, referred to the relevant standing committee for deliberation, and then placed on the plenary-session agenda.  
- Final adoption occurs by simple majority vote in the plenary session (本会議), not by unanimous consent of the 理事会.  
- The 理事会 (a steering body composed of the Speaker, Vice-Speaker and committee chairs) only coordinates the agenda and does not possess veto power requiring unanimity for opinion letters.  

Because the claim substitutes “理事会での全会一致” for the legally required plenary majority vote, it is factually incorrect.
cid_1988105062602961181_1988309368819900:
True

The claim asserts a legal separation between specific liabilities (Mexican tax disputes with SAT and U.S. creditor obligations) and the banking entity Banco Azteca. Under Mexican corporate law, Grupo Elektra, S.A.B. de C.V. and TV Azteca, S.A.B. de C.V. are distinct legal persons from Banco Azteca, S.A., Institución de Banca Múltiple, even though they share ultimate ownership. Tax assessments and creditor claims are formally docketed against the individual taxpayers or obligors; public records of SAT proceedings and U.S. court filings list Grupo Elektra and TV Azteca (or their subsidiaries) as the named parties, not the bank. Consequently, the factual predicate of the claim—separate legal identity and attribution of the cited obligations—holds.
